ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_records" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Patient's medical record number */,
  "date_of_diagnosis" TEXT /* Date of cancer diagnosis */,
  "referring_physician" TEXT /* Name of the referring physician */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "family_medical_history" TEXT /* Family medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer case */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "code_number" INTEGER /* Unique code number for the cancer case */,
  "clump_thickness" INTEGER /* Clump thickness of the tumor */,
  "uniformity_cell_size" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell size in the tumor */,
  "uniformity_cell_shape" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell shape in the tumor */,
  "marginal_adhesion" INTEGER /* Marginal adhesion of the tumor */,
  "single_epithelial_cell_size" INTEGER /* Size of single epithelial cells in the tumor */,
  "bare_nuclei" INTEGER /* Number of bare nuclei in the tumor */,
  "bland_chromatin" INTEGER /* Blandness of chromatin in the tumor */,
  "normal_nucleoli" INTEGER /* Normality of nucleoli in the tumor */,
  "mitoses" INTEGER /* Number of mitoses in the tumor */,
  "cancer_type" INTEGER /* Type of cancer (e.g., 2 for benign, 4 for malignant) */,
  "tumor_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tumor (e.g., I, II, III, IV) */,
  "tumor_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the tumor (e.g., low, intermediate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_cases_cancer_type FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cancer case ID */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., chemotherapy, surgery) */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., complete remission, partial remission) */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who administered the treatment */,
  "medications" TEXT /* List of medications used in the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of each medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of treatment administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cancer_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physicians" (
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Physician's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Physician's last name */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Physician's specialty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the physician */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_records" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up visit */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the follow-up visit */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who conducted the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_type" TEXT /* Type of follow-up (e.g., routine, urgent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_records_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Risk factors for the cancer type */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., oncology, surgery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer case accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the record was accessed (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cancer_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer case associated with the publication */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cancer_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table (e.g., patient_records, cancer_cases) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table (e.g., patient_records, cancer_cases) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the changes were made */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
